videos.headline: Jalen Milroe keeps it himself for 53-yard Alabama TD
videos.description: Alabama QB Jalen Milroe calls his own number and bursts 53 yards into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe keeps it himself for 53-yard Alabama TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jo'quavious Marks goes 29 yards on impressive carry
videos.description: Jo'quavious Marks goes 29 yards on impressive carry

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jo'quavious Marks goes 29 yards on impressive carry) 2023/10/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nick Saban furious after Mississippi State's TD
videos.description: Mississippi State QB Mike Wright keeps it himself for a touchdown, and Nick Saban isn't happy as he yells at Alabama DB Terrion Arnold.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nick Saban furious after Mississippi State's TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jase McClellan bursts up the middle for Bama TD
videos.description: Alabama RB Jase McClellan gets the handoff and bursts up the middle for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jase McClellan bursts up the middle for Bama TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalen Milroe scrambles for another Bama TD
videos.description: Alabama QB Jalen Milroe scrambles to avoid pressure and finds his way across the goal line for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe scrambles for another Bama TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Caleb Downs comes away with Bama interception
